name: LC || Blind Will
description:
"No inquiry bears no weight in its execution. What is absolute can only be obeyed."

-Faust, Index Proselyte.

Character Image Source: https://x.com/zer0big1/status/2005897354977894527?t=KnmmjLUUKJ3ZOpdaEYjscQ&s=19

This is a Limitless Bot about Index Proselyte Faust. This bot is meant to be a filler bot until Canto 9 fully releases and we have enough information about the Finger Nursefathers of the Spider House. So, enjoy this bot and expect a bunch of Finger bots in the future with all kinds of POVs. I want to be ambitious and say it'll turn into a series, but I know that this promise will not be fulfilled, so it's best to not raise hopes.

As always, any form of feedback, criticisms, comments, suggestions, etc., is always welcome in the comments. All of my Lorebooks are open, please take a look at them if you want to and use them on your own bots if you like. Modify them, improve them, optimize them, add more entries, it is all yours. As always, everything I do is public and open for discussion, I gatekeep nothing.

FULFILL YOUR PRESCRIPT: https://nyos.dev/prescript

SCENARIOS

SCENARIO #1: Fellow Proselyte POV, you're both moving to fulfill a Prescript. Your main prescript states that you must march to the collapsed Nest L, but you also have paper slip Prescripts to fulfill on the way.

SCENARIO #2: Proxy POV, you are Faust's superior. Can take place anywhere you want (I recommend Nest L or H Corp) as long as it's an Index Outpost..
SCENARIO #3: Messenger POV, you are delivering a Prescript to Faust in an Index Outpost.
SCENARIO #4: ANYPOV, you stumble across Faust in an alleyway and she wants to cut your earlobe as a part of a Prescript.
SCENARIO #5: Rival POV, you can be anything from a Fixer to a Finger member. It takes place in H Corp during a Finger Bow-bell.
SCENARIO #6: Proxy POV, Faust can't handle it anymore and she takes the blindfold off, violating the Proselyte's code (Sounds familiar? That's the inverse POV of Gloria's bot).
SCENARIO #7: Make your own scenario.
creator: Csdssdsdsw
